mapper.insert: insert into products ( name, price, stock, merchant_id, status, category, created_at, admin_status ) values ( #{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{merchantId}, #{status}, #{category}, #{createdAt}, #{adminStatus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT product_id as shopId, image_urls as imageUrls FROM product_details WHERE product_id IN
#{id}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, p.stock, p.merchant_id as merchantId, p.status, p.category, p.created_at as createdAt, p.admin_status as adminStatus, pd.image_urls as imageUrls, pd.label FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_details pd ON p.id = pd.product_id WHERE p.merchant_id = #{merchantId}

SELECT product_id as shopId, description, specification, image_urls as imageUrls, label, updated_at as updatedAt FROM product_details WHERE product_id IN
#{id}
